headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 13 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 13 airports right now. Engine anti-ice operations are flagged at Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV). Across base airports: 4 critical, 10 high, 10 medium, 15 normal. Key bases needing attention include Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR), Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) and Iaşi (IAS/LRIA); plus 11 other bases. 10 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is fog / freezing fog, RVR limitations and very low visibility  — most notably around Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV) and Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT). Network hotspots: Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT), Mohammed V (CMN/GMMN), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN) and 8 others. Primary drivers: mist, RVR limitations and very low visibility. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 13 airports right now. Base airports (focus): Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 200 m | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 700 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 700 m; below approach minima (current METAR) | Belgrade Nikola Tesla (BEG/LYBE) — HIGH: freezing fog; visibility down to 500 m | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 150 m, RVR down to 650 m, cloud base around 100 ft and 8 others. Worst affected now: Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions) | Craiova (CRA/LRCV) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 700 m; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Mohammed V (CMN/GMMN) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 700 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below alternate minima (current METAR) (drivers: runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits, very low visibility) | Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Turku (TKU/EFTU) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; runway contamination risk (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) and 7 others. Changed since last run: Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT), Mohammed V (CMN/GMMN), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN), Turku (TKU/EFTU), Oslo-Gardermoen (OSL/ENGM), Sandefjord Airport, Torp (TRF/ENTO), Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Bacău George Enescu (BCM/LRBC) and 2 others.
